mapper.sql: uw.id, uw.user_id, uw.word_id, uw.is_new, uw.is_learned, uw.is_mastered, uw.review_count, uw.last_review_time, uw.next_review_time, uw.create_time, uw.update_time, w.word, w.phonetic, w.meaning, w.example, w.example_meaning
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND uw.word_id = #{wordId}
SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND uw.is_new = 1 ORDER BY uw.create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND uw.is_learned = 1 AND uw.is_mastered = 0 AND (uw.next_review_time IS NULL OR uw.next_review_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY uw.next_review_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND uw.is_learned = 1 ORDER BY uw.last_review_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM t_user_word uw LEFT JOIN t_word w ON uw.word_id = w.id WHERE uw.user_id = #{userId} AND uw.is_mastered = 1 ORDER BY uw.last_review_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_word (user_id, word_id, is_new, is_learned, is_mastered, review_count, last_review_time, next_review_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{wordId}, #{isNew}, #{isLearned}, #{isMastered}, #{reviewCount}, #{lastReviewTime}, #{nextReviewTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_new = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_learned = 1 AND is_mastered = 0 AND (next_review_time IS NULL OR next_review_time <= #{now})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_learned = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_mastered = 1
